hooks.command: bash -c 'pkg=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -oP "packages/[^/]+" | head -1); if [ -n "$pkg" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "/src/"; then echo "[hook] Type-checking $pkg..."; cd /mnt/c/Users/kover/Documents/digitalcsa-kit && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "\.ai/.*\.adf$"; then echo "[hook] Checking ADF evidence..."; cd /mnt/c/Users/kover/Documents/digitalcsa-kit && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js adf evidence --auto-measure 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
